meaning: n.纳瓦拉(中世纪时期的位于西班牙东北部和法国西南部的王国)
examples: Navarre and his "rabblement of heretics" will be dealt with.
These, added to the detachments of De Givry, and Navarre, swelled Henry's army to forty-two thousand fighting men.
At the time, the designated heir to the throne was ruling Navarre, a small kingdom in the Pyrenees Mountains.
During the tour, a game will be played against Navarre's regional team on 29 December.
Andalucia, Navarre, Valencia and the Canaries in turn have more extensive powers than some other regions.
